'''Ossluk Noslee''' was a particularly skilled [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Soldier/Legends|warrior]]. Considering that—as in their traditional culture—most Gand never earned a name of their own, the fact that he had earned two was a testimony to his accomplishments. Later, near the end of the [[Dark Wars]], some individuals believed that a certain [[Ossluk's gloves|pair of gloves]] once belonged to Noslee, although they were no longer in his possession at that time. The gloves were valuable and augmented the user's combat abilities.<ref name="kotor2" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I heard that a mighty Gand warrior is on Nar Shaddaa. I think he is even in this very room! I was wondering if you might find out his name for me.|translated=1|A Sullustan giving a task to the Jedi Exile|<ref name="k2dlg1">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' dialogue file, StrRef 115606</ref>}}
In the [[Cut content from Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords|cut content]] of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]]—the player character in the game—was tasked to fulfill a side quest called "Naming of the Gand," in which a curious [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] would ask the Exile to find Ossluk's name.<ref name="k2dlg1" /> Upon finding the Gand, Ossluk would reveal his name, though he would ask to keep it as a secret.<ref name="k2dlg2">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' dialogue file, StrRef 115572</ref> Although the quest was cut from the game, an item called "Ossluk's [[Glove/Legends|gloves]]" is still obtainable in the game through a merchant or random drop.<ref name="kotor2" />
